text.message: Had to take it black sry
If you give a wood and brick
The desperate trade attempt was noble
Yeah I’m sorry red I’m gonna have to rob you at least 5 times for me to feel better tbb
It's not like you wouldn't have made the same play
I actually didn’t rob you initially
We were both competing for the same spot
Yeah and you robbed me multiple times and then plowed me
And you were about to toss black a huge advantage to make sure I couldn't win
Sorry I can’t control my feelings
Just going to report you and move on
Can’t report me if you’re doing well
Can y'all report blue as well?
You robbed me out of spite too remember?
lol black has soloed me every turn
u gonna report him too right
I think you're actually in first with me and second?
But yes the speed does make it seem like a spite
It’s so annoying to see red complaining while winning lol
My 5 robs of red are over
